title: How to Rank in Search Engines
body:
[xarop.net](http://www.xarop.net) has published a very interesting article on this topic. We all want to rank at the top of Google, but it’s not an easy task. Google is "smarter" than we think, and a website won’t get more traffic if we overuse keywords, throw in "clickbait" words, etc. You simply have to stick to the topic of the specific article, choose a title, and write the text with potential searchers of that content in mind. You can read it here: [How to Rank My Articles on Google](http://www.xarop.net/en_veu_alta/2007/08/como-posicionar.html) And here are some other links that discuss the topic:

-   [kiwoo.org](http://www.kiwoo.org/www/index.php?cat=3&id=31)
-   [telendro.com](http://www.telendro.com/)
